findings.message: Same CDN script-injection pattern for turndown@7.1.3 and (line 34) @mozilla/readability@0.5.0, no SRI hash; a vendored Readability.js already exists in the same directory and is not reused here

eval() executes file content whose path is derived from an overridable global; currently unreachable since nothing in-repo sets that global, but the primitive is a real arbitrary-file-read-into-eval if any caller ever does
CDN fallback dynamically loads and executes remote JS with no Subresource Integrity hash; version is pinned which mitigates but does not eliminate supply-chain risk
Downloads every image URL found on an extracted page via raw http/https.get; a 30s timeout already exists but there is no max response size cap
Agent frontmatter/description has zero <example> blocks demonstrating invocation
Glob is declared but never used in the agent body
GenerateImage is declared in tools: but the actual mechanism used in the body is a Bash script call, not the declared tool

Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies

The subagent roster table at the end of the workflow-producer SKILL.md omits memory-loader, which is otherwise an active, wired-in Stage-0 subagent
Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies

Sends user prompts to an external image-generation endpoint using an API key read from env; this is the tool's documented, intended feature, flagged per rubric pattern for completeness rather than as a defect

Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies — frontmatter name: workflow-producer; parent directory basename: 工作流导演

Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies — frontmatter name: style-modeler; parent directory basename: 风格建模

Frontmatter name does not match parent directory name, violating the open Agent Skills spec MUST rule; mirrored in .claude/ and plugins/writing-agent/ copies — frontmatter name: web-article-extractor; parent directory basename: 公众号文章获取

eval() executes file content whose path is derived from an overridable global; currently unreachable since nothing in-repo sets that global, but the primitive is a real arbitrary-file-read-into-eval if any caller ever does — return eval(scriptContent); where scriptContent = fs.readFileSync(path.join(SKILL_PATH, 'readability_extractor.js')) and SKILL_PATH is overridable via globalThis.__WEB_ARTICLE_EXTRACTOR_PATH__ (lines 15-17)

CDN fallback dynamically loads and executes remote JS with no Subresource Integrity hash; version is pinned which mitigates but does not eliminate supply-chain risk — script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mozilla/readability@0.6.0/Readability-readerable.min.js' injected via document.createElement('script')

Same CDN script-injection pattern for turndown@7.1.3 and (line 34) @mozilla/readability@0.5.0, no SRI hash; a vendored Readability.js already exists in the same directory and is not reused here — script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/turndown@7.1.3/dist/turndown.min.js' injected via document.createElement('script')

Sends user prompts to an external image-generation endpoint using an API key read from env; this is the tool's documented, intended feature, flagged per rubric pattern for completeness rather than as a defect — const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || process.env.THIRD_PARTY_API_KEY; used to call an external image-generation API via fetch (lines 80-85)

Downloads every image URL found on an extracted page via raw http/https.get; a 30s timeout already exists but there is no max response size cap — protocol.get(url, ...) where url comes from image.src extracted from arbitrary scraped web pages, downloaded to local disk
Agent frontmatter/description has zero <example> blocks demonstrating invocation — grep for <example> across .claude/agents/*.md returns zero matches in any of the 20 files
Glob is declared in tools: but never used in the agent body — 'Glob' appears exactly once in the file (the tools: frontmatter line); zero body references
Agent frontmatter/description has zero <example> blocks demonstrating invocation — grep for <example> across .claude/agents/*.md returns zero matches in any of the 20 files
Glob is declared but never used in the agent body — 'Glob' appears once (frontmatter only), zero body references

GenerateImage is declared in tools: but the actual mechanism used in the body is a Bash script call, not the declared tool — body invokes image generation via Bash: npx tsx scripts/generate_image.ts (line 95), never through a tool literally named GenerateImage

The subagent roster table at the end of the workflow-producer SKILL.md omits memory-loader, which is otherwise an active, wired-in Stage-0 subagent — Subagent 清单 table lists 19 rows (topic-generator through edit-diff-learner); memory-loader is absent from the table despite being described in prose as the Stage-0 agent and being stage id "0" in .claude/workflows/collab_v2.json
